description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a predominantly white exterior and a contrasting black heel tab. The shoe features a classic lace-up design with white eyelets and laces, and a rounded toe box. The midsole and outsole are thick and white, providing a chunky silhouette typical of modern streetwear sneakers. The heel area displays a small gold text detail, adding a subtle accent to the otherwise minimalist design. The upper material appears to be synthetic or leather, while the sole is likely made of rubber. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style suitable for everyday wear.
description: A white low-top sneaker with a black heel tab, gold text detail, and classic lace-up design. The shoe has a chunky white sole and a minimalist, urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white upper, black heel tab, and full lace row.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the black heel tab and gold text detail on the heel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the black heel tab and white upper visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded toe box and lacing system.
